inputs.label: Initial Investment (TL)
inputs.businessContext: Total capital expenditure for flexible manufacturing cell including machinery, installation, and training. Based on standard investment appraisal practices (NPV, IRR).

inputs.label: Annual Operating Cost (TL/year)
inputs.businessContext: Yearly costs for labor, maintenance, energy, and consumables. Referenced from lean manufacturing cost models.

inputs.label: Annual Revenue from Cell (TL/year)
inputs.businessContext: Expected yearly revenue generated by the flexible cell. Based on production capacity and market price.

inputs.label: Discount Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Weighted average cost of capital (WACC) or required rate of return. Standard financial metric (CAPM).

inputs.label: Project Life (years)
inputs.businessContext: Expected useful life of the flexible manufacturing cell. Based on equipment depreciation standards (e.g., MACRS).

inputs.label: Salvage Value (TL)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated resale value at end of project life. Based on industry benchmarks for manufacturing equipment.

inputs.label: Annual Production Volume (units/year)
inputs.businessContext: Number of units produced per year. Key driver for revenue and cost per unit.

inputs.label: Defect Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of defective units. Lean Six Sigma quality metric; threshold >5% triggers warning.

inputs.label: Setup Time per Batch (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Time to changeover between product variants. SMED methodology; lower is better for flexibility.

inputs.label: Batch Size (units)
inputs.businessContext: Number of units per production batch. Affects inventory and setup cost per unit.

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Hour (TL/hour)
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage including benefits. Used to calculate labor cost per unit.

inputs.label: Energy Cost per Unit (TL/unit)
inputs.businessContext: Energy consumption cost per unit. ISO 50001 energy management.

inputs.label: Maintenance Cost per Year (TL/year)
inputs.businessContext: Annual preventive and corrective maintenance. Based on equipment reliability standards.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level (0-1)
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Used to adjust output for uncertainty.

thresholds.setupTimePerBatch: setupTimePerBatch > 4 ? 'Warning: Setup time exceeds 4 hours; consider SMED' : ''
thresholds.discountRate: discountRate > 20 ? 'Warning: Discount rate is very high; check cost of capital' : ''

hiddenLossDrivers: defectRate > 5 ? 'High defect rate increases cost per unit' : ''
setupTimePerBatch > 4 ? 'Long setup time reduces flexibility and increases cost' : ''
annualNetCashFlow <= 0 ? 'Negative cash flow; investment not viable' : ''
suggestedActions: defectRate > 5 ? 'Implement Six Sigma DMAIC to reduce defects' : ''
setupTimePerBatch > 4 ? 'Apply SMED techniques to reduce setup time' : ''
npv < 0 ? 'Reconsider investment or reduce costs/increase revenue' : ''
paybackPeriod > projectLife/2 ? 'Consider improving cash flow to shorten payback' : ''
